title: プリティー・ガンマンズ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our day off, and Matikanefukukitaru and I
have plans to go buy new training clothes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for springing this on you at the last minute,
but I brought a friend along. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I just love me a bit of shoppin'! ♪
choice_data_list: Fine by me. Why the sudden change of plans?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, you see... The great Shiraoki revealed a
prophecy to me. "On this day, you shall deepen
your connections with the ones close to you."

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Holy moly... Is this "Shiraoki" some kinda prophet
or somethin'?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I say we ought to trust the prophet's judgment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite up to speed, but the three of us end
up going together.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this is some pretty cool gear. It has fifty
lucky stars on it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ayy, nice one! Put that on and you'll look just like
an American racer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we've got a little extra time on our
hands...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Look over there! See that movie
poster?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: There's a western playing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw, a spaghetti western! Makes me wanna see a good ol' fashioned Mexican standoff. Bang bang!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's all go see it! From the looks of it, I reckon
it's sure to be exciting!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I knew you'd say that! Thanks a million!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It looks like they're playing the same movie on
two different screens.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's a normal one and an "audience
participation version." ...Whatever that means.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, audience participation! That's pretty popular
lately. You get to cheer while you're watching the
movie.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Now then, time to decide our fate!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Should we sit back and relax, or really immerse
ourselves in the Wild West?
choice_data_list: Let's go to the normal screening.

The audience participation screening sounds
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I guess it's better to get into a no-nonsense
mood and contemplate the story. I get you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's get movin', Fukukitaru! I reckon we
should get ourselves a supersize servin' of
popcorn for two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The movie is a classic tale of a band of heroes
coming together to bring peace to a lawless town.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whoa! That was super intense, huh?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It shot a hole in my heart, and the winds of the
West are whistling right on through!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Same here! I wanna have a duel! And soak in a
bubble bath while shaving my five o'clock
shadow!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Maybe we should start slingin' pistols too...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, that store over there sells gun holsters!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Let's snap up a matching pair! We can hang them
from our belts and strut around like real cowboys!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sounds good! Starting today, we're the
quick-draw sisters of Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Two holsters, please! Also...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Give me one of those auspicious-looking shrine
ropes, please. Wait, it's a lasso?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They both seem to be really happy with their
matching merchandise!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's have a look. Though I am kind of
worried the audience is gonna get real rowdy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It'll be fine, Fukukitaru! I'm sure we'll have a blast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Inside the theater...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Over there, get 'em! Pew pew!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I'm talkin' to you, beardy! Once I count to
three, it's night night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The audience participation screening turns out to
be a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, I really got into it! I feel like I've become a
real rootin'-tootin' gunslinger now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Fukukitaru. Who are the gunners running
this outpost here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Why, you and me, of course! When we
team up, the bad guys down in the stronghold
know that they're all outta luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They're really getting into their roles. It seems
like the movie has got them feeling as tough as
the heroes of the Wild West.
